name: Daily Practice Reset
description: At 00:01 GMT-3, uncheck all Daily Practice boxes that are still checked.

prompts:
Follow @notion-daily-reset.md. This is the 00:01 GMT-3 reset run.

Only uncheck Daily Practice on Life Areas pages where it is checked (data source collection://831bd07d-cbb8-8380-a905-0738bbf5dac1).

1. Use Notion MCP.
2. Search data_source_url collection://831bd07d-cbb8-8380-a905-0738bbf5dac1 query area page_size 25.
3. Fetch each page; if Daily Practice is __YES__, update_properties to Daily Practice __NO__ only.
4. Append to notion-plan-logs.md under ## Reset YYYY-MM-DD with GMT-3 timestamp, pages reset, errors.

Do not commit or push notion-plan-logs.md (gitignored). Stop if blocked >2 minutes.
